message:
refactor(triage): consolidate unblocks computation

- Remove duplicate computeUnblocksMapInternal from TriageContext
- Reuse buildUnblocksMap from triage.go directly
- Optimize buildUnblocksMap to use graph traversal instead of issue iteration
- Use compact arrays (open[], openBlockerCount[]) instead of maps
- Fix nil vs empty slice semantics for test compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
